betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Book of Boxcars§f

§aThe mysterious black book — unlocks the ultimate crafting recipes!§f

The §bBook of Boxcars§f (hbm:book_of_) is a mysterious black book with unknown origins. It is associated with the legendary §bBoxcar§f and serves as a key item for unlocking some of the most powerful recipes in the mod.

§6Acquisition§f:
The Book of Boxcars is found in specific locations or obtained through specific processes involving the §bBoxcar§f (hbm:boxcar).

§6Uses§f:
§b• §bElectronium§f — Book of Boxcars + Dineutronium + Ionized Particles
§b• §bRod of Discord§f — Book of Boxcars + Euphemium
§b• §bThe Boxcar Mystery§f — the book is tied to the lore and mechanics of the Boxcar

§eTip§f: The Book of Boxcars is one of the most important utility items in endgame. It enables the Electronium recipe (required for FEnSU) and the Rod of Discord. Keep it safe in your base once acquired — you will need it multiple times!
